name: electron-chromium-upgrade
tagline: Guides Electron's Chromium version-upgrade workflow: resolves patch conflicts during `e sync --3` then fixes the resulting build.
verdict: A model of a tightly scoped skill: precise trigger condition, exhaustive failure-path handling (including named edge cases like a false 'no changes' git am state), bulk commit-format material correctly split into references/, and no security concerns of any kind. Only gap is the lack of a version field or changelog to signal when the skill itself last.

highlights.summary: No version field in frontmatter and no changelog or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
